Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Readers]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 18''' — Readers might be able to craft messages for specific listeners.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 22''' — Readers can see visions of the past, goals for the future, dreams, hopes, and nightmares in everyday objects.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 3''' — Readers in the Empire were unable to find any trace of the Kidnapper before his death.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 4''' — Private Readers invested the contents of a wooden case for Ulrich Fletcher.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 13''' — Readers are a group that can use weapons.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 17''' — Readers are believed to be the key to humanity's advancement.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 26''' — Readers confirmed the disappearance of the Heart on the Island.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 6''' — The Readers on all three crews worked together to rig a contraption.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 7''' — Readers believe the physical structure of an Awakened object changes to align with invested Intent.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 3''' — Readers are members of the Council of Architects.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 7''' — The open eye symbol can signify Readers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 11''' — Readers are considered to be above the law.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 13''' — The Imperial Guard has Readers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 16''' — The rise of Readers caused the use of Optasias to fall from common usage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 17''' — Readers are currently examining survivors from an assassination attempt.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 17''' — The Readers checked Lucan's condition.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 20''' — Shera believes Readers die ordinary deaths.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 16''' — Readers are employed by the Navigator’s Guild.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 14''' — Readers are associated with picking up objects with unusual Intent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 22''' — Readers need weeks to safely and effectively Awaken anything.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
